questions.question: What does SQL stand for?
Which Python library is primarily used for data manipulation and analysis?
What is the purpose of cross-validation in machine learning?
options: To evaluate model performance on unseen data

questions.question: In statistics, what does 'p-value' represent?
options: The probability of the population mean
The power of the statistical test
The probability of observing the data given the null hypothesis is true

questions.question: Which algorithm is used for dimensionality reduction?
What is overfitting in machine learning?
options: When a model performs poorly on training data
When a model is too simple to capture patterns
When a model performs well on training data but poorly on new data
When there is too much data for the model

questions.question: Which visualization library in Python is built on top of Matplotlib?
What type of machine learning is used when the model learns from labeled data?
In a confusion matrix, what does 'True Positive' represent?
What is the primary purpose of the 'train-test split' in machine learning?
options: To evaluate model performance on unseen data

questions.question: Which measure of central tendency is most affected by outliers?
What does API stand for in software development?
In data science, what is 'feature engineering'?
options: Creating new variables from existing data
Selecting the best machine learning algorithm

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a type of database?
What is the main advantage of using ensemble methods in machine learning?
options: Improved prediction accuracy by combining multiple models

questions.question: Which of the following is a measure of model performance for classification tasks?
What does ETL stand for in data engineering?
In deep learning, what is a 'neuron' in a neural network?
options: A computational unit that receives inputs and produces an output

questions.question: Which technique is used to prevent overfitting by randomly dropping neurons during training?
What is the purpose of A/B testing in data science?
options: To compare two versions and determine which performs better
